subtopics: Force between point charges, forces between multiple charges, continuous charge distribution
key_concepts: Conservation of charge
Electric field due to a point charge
Electric dipole and torque in uniform electric field

subtopics: Potential due to point charge, dipole, system of charges; equipotential surfaces; potential energy
key_concepts: Conductors and insulators
Dielectrics and electric polarization
Capacitance and combination in series/parallel
Energy stored in a capacitor (formulae only)

subtopics: Flow of charges, drift velocity, mobility; V-I characteristics (linear/non-linear)
key_concepts: Electrical energy and power
Resistivity and conductivity with temperature dependence
Internal resistance of a cell
Combination of cells in series/parallel
Kirchhoff's rules and Wheatstone bridge

subtopics: Oersted's experiment, Biot-Savart law (circular loop), Ampere's law (straight wire/solenoid)
key_concepts: Force on moving charge in magnetic/electric fields
Force on current-carrying conductor and between parallel conductors
Torque on a current loop, Current loop as magnetic dipole

subtopics: Bar magnet as equivalent solenoid, magnetic dipole field (qualitative)
Magnetic properties: Para-, dia- and ferro-magnetism
key_concepts: Torque on a magnetic dipole
Effect of temperature on magnetic properties
Current loop as magnetic dipole moment, Moving coil galvanometer (sensitivity/conversion)

subtopics: Faraday's laws, Lenz's Law, Self and mutual induction
Peak/RMS values, reactance/impedance, LCR series circuit (phasors), resonance
key_concepts: Power in AC circuits, power factor, wattless current
AC generator and Transformer

topics: Nature and Spectrum of EM Waves
key_concepts: Electromagnetic spectrum: radio to gamma rays
Elementary facts about uses of different bands

subtopics: Spherical mirrors (mirror formula), refraction at spherical surfaces/lenses (thin lens/maker's formula)
Total internal reflection and optical fibers, Prism refraction
Magnification and power of lenses, combination in contact
Huygen's principle, reflection/refraction of plane waves (proofs)
Young's double slit experiment (fringe width expression only)
key_concepts: Coherent sources and sustained interference
Diffraction due to single slit (central maxima qualitative treatment)

chapters.source_chapter_name: Dual Nature of Radiation and Matter
key_concepts: Hertz/Lenard observations, Einstein's photoelectric equation (particle nature)
Experimental study of photoelectric effect
Wave nature of particles, de-Broglie relation
Alpha-particle scattering, Rutherford's model
Bohr model: radius, velocity, energy of nth orbit (hydrogen)
Hydrogen line spectra (qualitative treatment)
Composition, size of nucleus, nuclear force
Mass-energy relation, mass defect, binding energy per nucleon variation
Nuclear fission and fusion

chapters.source_chapter_name: Semiconductor Electronics: Materials, Devices and Simple Circuits
key_concepts: Conductors, semiconductors (intrinsic/extrinsic p & n type), insulators (qualitative)
p-n junction I-V characteristics (forward/reverse bias)
Diode as a rectifier
